tasks.subject: Implement two-signal fragmentation detection in needs_compaction()
tasks.description: Replace write_count >= threshold with free_ratio + row_waste_ratio analysis from DuckDB pragma_database_size() and pragma_storage_info(). Add compaction_threshold and compaction_min_size_mb to DbConfig. Update db_writer.rs to pass new config.

tasks.subject: Implement 3-phase atomic EXPORT/IMPORT compaction protocol
tasks.description: Replace CHECKPOINT stub in run_compaction() with: preflight disk check, snapshot HNSW DDL, CHECKPOINT + close, write intent file (fsyncd), rename DB to .old, EXPORT DATABASE to Parquet, IMPORT DATABASE, rebuild HNSW, CHECKPOINT, rename new DB to active, remove intent + .old. Reopen connection afterward.

tasks.subject: Add Rust unit tests (contract tests) for DbBackend
tasks.description: Add #[cfg(test)] module with contract tests: open/close idempotent, write_batch sequential IDs, upsert-on-conflict, delete cascades to embeddings, idempotent ensure_embedding_table, needs_compaction false on fresh DB, delete_files removes record. Add rlib to crate-type and tempfile dev-dependency.
